src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/mo.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with the new List.getFirst() method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/mo.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21, causing deprecation warnings or compile errors if -Werror is enabled.
